授業目的: The purpose of this lecture is to deepen the understandings of foreign aid. Specifically, we will learn official development assistance (ODA), Japanese ODA, and Chinese foreign aid including Belt and Road Initiative.
到達目標: (1) Students understand key points for each topic(2) Students collect data from databases, tabulate, and analyze(3) Students formalize idea, write a report, and make a presentation
関連科目: ミクロ経済学, Basic Economics

第1回:
[Startup Week] Online class (on-demand format) /《90 min》Course guidance.
Link:
第2回: [Core Week ➀] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》What is official development assistance (ODA)?
第3回: [Core Week ②] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》What are determinations of aid allocation?
第4回: [Core Week ③] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Has ODA really been effective?
第5回: [Flex Hours] (On-demand format)/《90 min》ODA in practice
第6回: [Core Week ④] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Japanese ODA 1: Origin, evolution, and characteristics
第7回: [Core Week ⑤] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Japanese ODA 2: Tied aid
第8回: [Core Week ⑥] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Japanese ODA 3: Infrastructure exxports
第9回: [Core Week ⑦] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Chinese foreign aid 1: Origin, evolution, and characteristics
第10回: [Core Week ⑧] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Chinese foreign aid 2: Determinants and impacts
第11回: [Core Week ⑨] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Chinese foreign aid 3: Belt and Road Initiative
第12回: [Core Week ⑩] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Aid and trade
第13回: [Core Week ⑪] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Environmental Kuznets curve hypothesis
第14回: [Core Week ⑫] (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》Data exercise
第15回: [Classes and Examinations Period] Week 1 (Face-to-face class)/《90 min》In-class presentation

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1

成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Students are evaluated by accuracy, depth, and originality.
成績評価Grading2: 授業外学修課題／Assignment, homework required outside class (06)
Students are evaluated by accuracy for data exercise.
成績評価Grading3: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
Students are evaluated by clarity, depth of understanding, and oral presentation.

name: 【300】開発経済学／Development Economics
